unity_import.scale: 1 Unity unit = 1 meter; import OBJ scale factor 1.0.
unity_import.axis: +Y up, +Z forward/down-barrel for weapons, +Z room-facing for wall props.
unity_import.socket_markers: Magenta geometry groups named SOCKET_* are temporary locator meshes; recreate as empty transforms or sockets during prefab integration.

materials.MAT_Brass_Worn: Worn aged brass, intended metallic 1.0 roughness 0.42.
materials.MAT_Brass_PolishedEdge: Bright brass edge/collar material, intended metallic 1.0 roughness 0.30.
materials.MAT_BlackenedIron: Blackened iron and soot-dark frame, intended metallic 0.85 roughness 0.60.
materials.MAT_HeatStainedSteel: Heat-stained steel for barrels and slug bodies.
materials.MAT_WalnutLeather_Dark: Dark walnut or leather grip material.
materials.MAT_GaugeFace_Cream: Cream enamel gauge or label face.
materials.MAT_Glass_PressureAmber: Amber pressure glass; author translucent/emissive variant in Unity if desired.
materials.MAT_SocketMarker_Magenta: Temporary visible socket locator geometry. Hide/delete after anchors are recreated.

assets.name: WPN_PressurePistol_Viewmodel_Blockout
assets.title: Pressure Pistol Hero Viewmodel Blockout
assets.approx_dimensions_m: Approx 0.22 m W x 0.33 m H x 0.82 m L including socket markers; readable compact sidearm silhouette.
assets.pivot: Origin near dominant hand grip center; +Z points down barrel, +Y up.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Muzzle
sockets.purpose: Muzzle flash, projectile origin, primary and burst VFX.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Grip_Dominant
sockets.purpose: Right-hand grip pose; one-hand VR dominant grip.

sockets.name: SOCKET_PressureChamber
sockets.purpose: Underbarrel chamber highlight and alternate fire pressure dump.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Valve
sockets.purpose: Side valve twist for reload/check and empty click.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Vent_Right
sockets.purpose: Steam vent puff during alternate pressure burst.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Trigger
sockets.purpose: Trigger motion anchor.

import_notes: Import OBJ at scale factor 1.0; 1 Unity unit equals 1 meter.
Use mesh as a viewmodel LOD0 blockout/proportion target, not gameplay collision.
Material slots intentionally separate brass, blackened iron, walnut/leather, copper, gauge face, amber glass, and socket markers.
animation_notes: Receiver and barrel recoil as one assembly: kick back -Z 0.035 m and pitch up 4-6 degrees.
Underbarrel pressure chamber pulses/glows for alternate fire; vent from right side socket.
Side valve rotates around local X for check/reload and empty click.
Gauge needle can tremble during idle and snap upward during pressure burst.
Trigger rotates slightly backward; grip remains stable for VR one-hand pose.
collision_notes: Use no mesh collider for viewmodel.
Future world pickup should use a simple box/capsule proxy around receiver and grip.
lod_notes: LOD0 final target can keep distinct gauge/valve/tube elements.
LOD1 should collapse rivets and socket marker geometry.
LOD2/mobile can remove side valve spokes and copper pipe loops.

assets.name: WPN_SteamScattergun_Viewmodel_Blockout
assets.title: Steam Scattergun Hero Viewmodel Blockout
assets.approx_dimensions_m: Approx 0.38 m W x 0.42 m H x 1.12 m L including socket markers; broad triple-barrel breacher silhouette.
assets.pivot: Origin near rear dominant grip; +Z points down barrels, +Y up.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Muzzle
sockets.purpose: Center of triple-barrel muzzle flash; cone/slug VFX should branch per barrel.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Grip_Dominant
sockets.purpose: Right-hand grip/trigger pose.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Grip_Support
sockets.purpose: Support hand/pump pose; optional VR second hand.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Pump
sockets.purpose: Pump group slides along Z after primary fire.

sockets.name: SOCKET_PressureChamber
sockets.purpose: Rear pressure chamber lock/slug charge.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Valve
sockets.purpose: Rotating cap/valve for slug chamber lock.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Vent_Left
sockets.purpose: Broad steam vent after blast.

import_notes: Viewmodel is intentionally oversized and asymmetric for first-person readability.
Triple barrels, pump, shell rack, pressure chamber, valve, and socket markers are distinct OBJ groups.
animation_notes: Whole weapon bucks back -Z 0.055 m with 7-9 degree pitch on primary.
MOVING_PumpGrip slides -Z 0.08 m then returns after primary blast.
Right valve wheel rotates around local X before alternate slug fire.
Rear pressure chamber coils can vibrate at idle and brighten during slug charge.
Side shell rack can index or shake as a non-critical secondary motion.
collision_notes: Future pickup/world version can use a compound box collider: receiver, barrel cluster, pump grip.
lod_notes: LOD0 final target should preserve the triple muzzle cluster and side shell rack.
LOD1 can merge barrel bands and simplify valve spokes.
LOD2/mobile can remove coil rings and shell rack cylinders while preserving broad silhouette.

assets.name: PICKUP_PressureCell_Ammo_Blockout
assets.title: Pressure Pistol Ammo / Pressure Cell Pickup
assets.approx_dimensions_m: Approx 0.24 m W x 0.43 m H x 0.20 m D including socket markers; small upright pressure cell.
assets.pivot: Origin at base center for stable world placement.

sockets.name: SOCKET_PickupVFX
sockets.purpose: Amber pickup glint/steam puff origin.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Valve
sockets.purpose: Tiny top valve spin or idle hiss.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Collision
sockets.purpose: Suggested trigger capsule center, radius 0.16 m, height 0.42 m.

import_notes: Readable as pistol ammo at floor height; top valve and amber glass identify pressure contents.
animation_notes: Idle pickup can bob 0.03 m and rotate slowly around Y.
Top valve can spin briefly on pickup.
Amber tube can pulse with ammo highlight material.
collision_notes: Use a trigger capsule: radius 0.16 m, height 0.42 m.
Optional small cylinder/box visual mesh only; do not use detailed mesh as collision.
lod_notes: No LOD needed for v0 if used sparingly.
Mobile variant can remove rivets and top wheel spokes.

assets.name: PICKUP_ScattergunSlugCanister_Blockout
assets.title: Scattergun Ammo / Slug Canister Pickup
assets.approx_dimensions_m: Approx 0.46 m W x 0.38 m H x 0.31 m D including socket markers; squat ammo canister with visible brass slugs.
assets.pivot: Origin at bottom center for floor placement.

sockets.name: SOCKET_PickupVFX
sockets.purpose: Pickup glint and slug ammo steam puff.

sockets.name: SOCKET_LidHinge
sockets.purpose: Optional lid flip/inspect animation.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Collision
sockets.purpose: Suggested trigger box 0.46 m W x 0.38 m H x 0.32 m D.

import_notes: Designed as a world pickup silhouette, not a viewmodel part.
Slug tubes are intentionally separated as material-readable brass rounds.
animation_notes: Canister can rotate/bob as a pickup.
Lid hinge can pop open for pickup feedback.
Visible slug tubes can glow or flash on pickup.
collision_notes: Use a trigger box 0.46 m W x 0.38 m H x 0.32 m D.
Optional simple rigidbody collider can be a box around rack base only if used as set dressing.
lod_notes: LOD1 can merge rack and remove handle bolts.
LOD2/mobile can replace individual slugs with a single brass insert block.

assets.name: PROP_WallPressureStation_Blockout
assets.title: Wall-Mounted Pressure Station Prop
assets.approx_dimensions_m: Approx 0.78 m W x 1.12 m H x 0.29 m D including socket markers; wall-mounted station with gauges and valve.
assets.pivot: Origin at bottom-center of wall contact plane; back face sits near Z 0.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Interact
sockets.purpose: Player interaction trace target.

sockets.name: SOCKET_ValveWheel
sockets.purpose: Valve wheel rotation anchor.

sockets.name: SOCKET_SteamVent
sockets.purpose: Steam puff/pressure release VFX.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Hose
sockets.purpose: Future hose/nozzle attach point.

sockets.name: SOCKET_WallMount
sockets.purpose: Backplate wall align point.

import_notes: Place against a wall with local +Z facing into the room.
Use as a staged interactable prop; gameplay hook should target SOCKET_Interact later.
animation_notes: Large valve wheel rotates around local Z 100-160 degrees during use.
Gauge needles can swing up/down during pressure station activation.
Top vent emits short steam burst after interaction.
Copper side pipes can pulse via material animation.
collision_notes: Use a simple box collider around the backplate, approx 0.74 m W x 1.08 m H x 0.10 m D.
If interactive, add a trigger/interact volume protruding 0.35 m from the valve wheel.
lod_notes: LOD0 keeps gauges, valve spokes, cylinders, and pipe routes.
LOD1 can flatten small rivets and simplify pipe elbows.
LOD2/mobile can replace wheel spokes with a disk silhouette and remove needles.

assets.name: PROP_CrankLeverSwitch_Blockout
assets.title: Crank Lever / Switch Prop
assets.approx_dimensions_m: Approx 0.38 m W x 0.55 m H x 0.22 m D including socket markers; compact crank switch silhouette.
assets.pivot: Origin at bottom-center of wall contact plane; back face sits near Z 0.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Interact
sockets.purpose: Player interaction trace target near handle.

sockets.name: SOCKET_LeverPivot
sockets.purpose: Lever/crank rotates around local Z from idle to pulled state.

sockets.name: SOCKET_Handle
sockets.purpose: Hand/contact point for pull animation.

sockets.name: SOCKET_WallMount
sockets.purpose: Wall/console align point.

import_notes: Place on wall panels, machinery, or console fronts with +Z facing the player.
MOVING_LeverArm and MOVING_WoodHandle groups should become separate child meshes for animation if integrated.
animation_notes: Lever rotates around SOCKET_LeverPivot/local Z by roughly 70 degrees.
Wood handle can counter-rotate around its own X axis while lever moves.
Ratchet teeth can click via audio/VFX at start, midpoint, and end stops.
collision_notes: Use a small box collider on plate, approx 0.32 m W x 0.50 m H x 0.08 m D.
Use a trigger/interact volume around handle, approx 0.20 m radius.
lod_notes: LOD0 keeps ratchet teeth, hub, lever, handle, and rivets.
LOD1 can merge plate and hub details.
LOD2/mobile can remove ratchet teeth and socket marker geometry.
